description:
GOAL: Driver fn that runs the two single-pass functions to fixpoint with
GROWTH_CAP enforcement, and wire it into compile_with_backend after
rewrite_known_target_closures.

Parent: fz-ul4.11.15. Depends on: fz-ul4.11.15.3.

## Deliverables (extend src/ir_inline.rs)

  /// Iterate the two passes to fixpoint or MAX_ITERATIONS, whichever comes
  /// first. Enforces GROWTH_CAP per fn: track each fn's stmt_count BEFORE
  /// the first iteration; if a candidate post-rewrite stmt_count would exceed
  /// 4x the pre-pass baseline for that caller fn, reject that individual site.
  /// Returns total rewrites performed across all iterations.
  pub fn inline_module(m: &mut Module) -> usize;

  Pass order per iteration:
    1. inline_tail_calls_once(m)
    2. inline_calls_once(m)

## GROWTH_CAP implementation

  Before iteration loop:
    let baseline: HashMap<FnId, usize> =
        m.fns.iter().map(|f| (f.id, stmt_count(f))).collect();

  Per-site: hypothetical post-stmt-count = caller_baseline + callee_stmts.
  If > 4 * baseline[caller.id], reject this site, continue.
  Baseline is fixed at start (not recomputed per iteration).

## Pipeline integration

  src/ir_codegen.rs compile_with_backend (ir_codegen.rs:1491+, pipeline
  at lines 1710-1719):

    let mut working = module.clone();
    let pre_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);
    crate::ir_typer::rewrite_vec_kinds(&mut working, &pre_types)?;
    let mid_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);
    crate::ir_typer::rewrite_known_target_closures(&mut working, &mid_types);
    // <<< INSERT: ir_inline::inline_module(&mut working); >>>
    let module_types = crate::ir_typer::type_module(&working);   // line 1719

  Insertion point: after line 1718, before line 1719.

  Also add `mod ir_inline;` in src/main.rs (after `mod ir_codegen;`).

  Rationale: rewrite_known_target_closures has already converted
  known-target closures to direct Call/TailCall, expanding inlinable sites.
  The final type_module at 1719 then sees fused bodies.

## Tests

  - Chain inline: A tail-calls B tail-calls C, all leaves; after
    inline_module, A's body has no TailCall to B or C.
  - Fixpoint terminates on no-inlinable-sites module (returns 0).
  - MAX_ITERATIONS stops at 3 even when more inlining is possible.
  - GROWTH_CAP: caller with 4 stmts, callee with 5 stmts, 10 callsites;
    only first few inline before cap kicks in.
  - End-to-end: full fixture suite passes unchanged.

## Risks

  - Inliner after rewrite_known_target_closures but before final type_module:
    the typer sees inlined bodies; semantically equivalent code produces
    equivalent types. Full test suite is the mitigation.

## Acceptance

  - cargo test passes (no regressions).
  - New inliner-driver tests pass.
  - `fz run` / `fz test` works on existing fixtures.
  - One commit referencing fz-ul4.11.15.5.

## References

  - src/ir_codegen.rs:1491     — compile_with_backend entry
  - src/ir_codegen.rs:1710-19  — pipeline sequence (insertion point at 1718/1719)
  - fz-ul4.29.10.3             — rewrite_known_target_closures (runs just before)
title: Inliner fixpoint + bloat cap + pipeline integration
